meta.title: StoryDeck
meta.subtitle: A template-driven generator for mobile-first HTML story pages.

sections.title: What it solves
sections.body: StoryDeck is designed for teams that already know what they want to say but need a faster way to package that message into a polished mobile page.

items.title: Content-first workflow
items.body: Start from notes, Markdown, or JSON instead of hand-coding layouts.

items.title: Themeable output
items.body: Switch visual direction without rewriting the underlying story.

items.title: Portable delivery
items.body: Export one standalone HTML file for demos, archives, and static hosting.

items.label: Step 1
items.title: Public demo
items.body: Launch a GitHub Pages site with two or three polished sample stories.

items.label: Step 2
items.title: Template packs
items.body: Add reusable section combinations for launches, explainers, and internal storytelling.

items.label: Step 3
items.title: Richer modules
items.body: Expand the schema to support image-led blocks, calls to action, and richer transitions.

sections.title: Why this is worth building
sections.body: The biggest opportunity is not one generated page. It is building a repeatable publishing workflow around content that already exists.
sections.action: Start with one story, then turn it into a system.
